headline: AI impact (speed + quality)
lede: Measured improvements after adopting AI-assisted workflows with verification (tests, reviews, and staged rollout). Replace these sample numbers with your real baseline and current values.
notes: Workflow: AI for exploration + drafting → human review → tests → staged rollout → post-deploy checks.

dataSource: Manual tracking + PR/Jira notes (replace with your source)
